_README.description: Model metadata for X.AI (GROK) API access.
_README.usage: Models listed here are exposed directly through the X.AI provider. Aliases are case-insensitive.
_README.provenance: Context windows, aliases, and the function-calling/structured-output/reasoning flags are taken from the model table xAI publishes at https://docs.x.ai/docs/models (maxPromptLength + ModelFeatures). grok-3, grok-4, and grok-3-fast were retired upstream and are no longer served.
_README.max_output_tokens_note: xAI does not publish a max-output-token limit for any Grok model, so the field is omitted rather than guessed. It only feeds the capability-rank bonus in ModelCapabilities.get_effective_capability_rank().

models.description: Grok 4.5 - X.AI's flagship: agentic tool calling, vision, configurable reasoning (xAI recommends it for code and everything else)
Grok 4.3 - Previous flagship, 1M context with reasoning and vision
